Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "DIZZY-5B00-14A0-2000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $5b00 jsr $14a0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dizzy.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The call to $5B00 displays the loading screen, which includes the outer frame of the gameplay area. Added another routine at $14A0 which waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
